# Film Composers Timeline

A visualization project mapping film composer careers.

## Key Files
- [composers.html](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/data-viz/timelines/Film%20Composers/composers.html): Main timeline entry point.
- [PROJECT_STATE.md](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/data-viz/timelines/Film%20Composers/PROJECT_STATE.md): Architecture and current status.
- [README.md](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/data-viz/timelines/Film%20Composers/README.md): Project overview.

## Data Structure
- `data/composer_lifespans.json`: Biographical data.
- `data/Most important films.json`: Chronological film markers.
